The '''Mother Queen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[urnsor'is]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] was hired by two [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] members of the [[Myyydril]] tribe to kill the beast, and this spacer was successful in this mission.

==Description==
The Mother Queen was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of the [[urnsor'is]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="SWG" /> and had four [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a set of large teeth on her head. The head was attached to an abdomen that had two patches that were [[Color/Legends|colored]] light blue. The beast also possessed six [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] and a tail,<ref name="SWGTCG">{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=Queen's Healing Touch}}</ref> and her body contained a special healing [[Salve/Legends|salve]].<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
The Mother Queen was the source of the species' infestation within the [[Myyydril Caverns/Legends|Myyydril Caverns]] on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="SWG" /> She was protected by her urnsor'is guardians and always had juvenile members of her species surrounding her. [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kallaarac]] and [[Nurse/Legends|Nurse]] [[Yraka Nes]] of the [[Myyydril]] tribe both wished the creature's [[Death/Legends|death]]. Nes required the salve from her body,<ref name="SWG" /><ref name="SWGTCG" /> while Kallaarac wished the beast destroyed so that the tribe could finally live in peace. The [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] they contracted to perform the deed for them was successful in slaying the [[Parasite/Legends|parasite]]. Kallaarac and Yraka rewarded the spacer for their efforts.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Mother Queen appeared as an enemy creature in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' expansion pack, [[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees|''Rage of the Wookiees'']], released in [[2005]]. She also appeared in the artwork for the "Quest" card titled "Queen's Healing Touch"—which was also the name of the quest Yraka Nes gave the player to kill the Queen—in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxies Trading Card Game]]'' set [[Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|''Champions of the Force'']]. ''Star Wars Galaxies'' was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
